summary: Complete testing of Master SKU API and SKU Pricing features on both Account Detail and Lead Detail pages. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend feature tests passed. No issues found.
passed_tests: Backend: Master SKU list contains expected SKUs (20L Premium, Nyla variants, 24 Brand)
Backend: Each SKU has required fields (sku, category, unit)
Backend: Lead proposed_sku_pricing can be updated and persists
Backend: Account sku_pricing can be updated and persists
Account Detail: Edit Account button enables editing mode
Account Detail: Add SKU button adds new SKU row
Account Detail: SKU dropdown shows all 14 master SKUs from API
Lead Detail: Proposed SKU Pricing section with Edit Pricing button present
Lead Detail: Add First SKU button present when no pricing exists
Lead Detail: SKU dropdown shows all 14 master SKUs from API
Lead Detail: Can add SKU with price and bottle credit values
Lead Detail: Save shows success toast 'Proposed SKU pricing saved'
Lead Detail: Saved SKU pricing persists after page refresh
Lead Detail: Can remove proposed SKU and save successfully
Lead Detail: Empty state shows after removing all SKUs
critical_code_review_comments: MASTER_SKUS list correctly defined in backend/server.py (line 721-738)
/api/master-skus endpoint properly authenticated and returns expected structure
skusAPI.getMasterList() correctly fetches master SKUs in api.js
AccountDetail.js properly uses masterSkus state with Select dropdown
LeadDetail.js properly implements Proposed SKU Pricing section with CRUD operations

All relevant data-testid attributes present for testing (sku-select-*, add-sku-btn, proposed-sku-pricing-card, add-first-sku-btn, edit-pricing-btn, save-pricing-btn, proposed-sku-select-*, proposed-price-input-*)
seed_data_creation: Tested with existing accounts and leads. Created test lead 'TEST_SKU_Pricing_Lead' for backend tests (cleaned up after test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Master SKU API and SKU Pricing features fully working. Key test-ids: sku-select-{index}, add-sku-btn, proposed-sku-pricing-card, add-first-sku-btn, edit-pricing-btn, save-pricing-btn, proposed-sku-select-{index}, proposed-price-input-{index}, remove-proposed-sku-{index}. Master SKU list contains 14 SKUs including 20L Premium, 20L Regular, Nyla variants (Silver, Gold, Sparkling), and 24 Brand.
